recommendations.title: The Invisible
recommendations.overview: After an attack leaves him in limbo -- invisible to the living and also near death -- a teenager discovers the only person who might be able help him is his attacker.

recommendations.title: The Unborn
recommendations.overview: A young woman fights the spirit that is slowly taking possession of her.

recommendations.title: Major League II
recommendations.overview: After losing in the ALCS the year before, the Cleveland Indians are determined to make it into the World Series this time! However, they first have to contend with Rachel Phelps again when she buys back the team.

recommendations.title: King Ralph
recommendations.overview: As the only relative in line to ascend the Royal throne, a down-on-his-luck American slob must learn the ways of the English.

recommendations.title: The Program
recommendations.overview: Several players from different backgrounds try to cope with the pressures of playing football at a major university. Each deals with the pressure differently, some turn to drinking, others to drugs, and some to studying.

recommendations.title: Tremors 4: The Legend Begins
recommendations.overview: In 1889, seventeen men die under mysterious circumstances, and spooked by recent events, the miners who populate the town leave in droves until there's nothing left but a shell of a community.

recommendations.title: Major League

recommendations.director: Rodney Rothman, Peter Ramsey, Bob Persichetti

recommendations.title: Blade: Trinity

recommendations.title: Tremors 2: Aftershocks
recommendations.overview: Earl Bassett's celebrity after defeating the Graboid attack against the town of Perfection has proved short-lived, until he's recruited by a Mexican oil company whose workers have found more than they bargained for under the soil.
